title: Replace QR code with uploaded State Bank of India QR code image

requirements.summary: Replace the existing payment QR code image on the OrderForm page with the uploaded State Bank of India QR code image (IMG_3581-1.jpeg)
acceptanceCriteria: The OrderForm page displays the uploaded QR code image (IMG_3581-1.jpeg) instead of the previous QR code
The QR code is positioned prominently after product selection and quantity fields but before the WhatsApp submit button
The QR code image maintains proper dimensions and clarity for scanning
The QR code remains clickable and opens PhonePe mobile application when tapped

file_operations.description: Copy the uploaded State Bank of India QR code image (IMG_3581-1.jpeg) to the frontend public assets directory so it can be referenced as a static asset in the OrderForm component

Update the QR code image source to reference the new State Bank of India QR code at /assets/IMG_3581-1.jpeg. Maintain the existing PhonePe deep link functionality, positioning after product selection and quantity fields but before the WhatsApp submit button, and ensure proper dimensions for scanning clarity. Preserve the real-time total amount calculation feature and all existing form validation logic.
